sourceCollection.name: Englishphile Sentence Transformation Pack 001
sourceCollection.copyrightNote: Original Englishphile pilot content generated for internal educational use; not copied verbatim from uploaded worksheets or third-party books.

problems.title: Sentence Transformation Set 01
problems.statement: Viết lại câu sao cho nghĩa không đổi.
problems.instructions: Nếu có từ khóa, không thay đổi dạng của từ khóa. Hệ thống chỉ chấm đúng tuyệt đối; câu khác đáp án mẫu sẽ cần giáo viên kiểm tra.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: I only realised how serious the problem was when I read the report.

accepted: Not until I read the report did I realise how serious the problem was.
answer.display: Not until I read the report did I realise how serious the problem was.

metadata.originalSentence: I only realised how serious the problem was when I read the report.
metadata.modelAnswer: Not until I read the report did I realise how serious the problem was.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: She was so absorbed in the book that she missed her stop.

accepted: She was so wrapped up in the book that she missed her stop.
answer.display: She was so wrapped up in the book that she missed her stop.

metadata.originalSentence: She was so absorbed in the book that she missed her stop.
metadata.modelAnswer: She was so wrapped up in the book that she missed her stop.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The committee will not approve the plan under any circumstances.

accepted: Under no circumstances will the committee approve the plan.
answer.display: Under no circumstances will the committee approve the plan.

metadata.originalSentence: The committee will not approve the plan under any circumstances.
metadata.modelAnswer: Under no circumstances will the committee approve the plan.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: He regrets not applying for the scholarship.

accepted: He wishes he had applied for the scholarship.
answer.display: He wishes he had applied for the scholarship.

metadata.originalSentence: He regrets not applying for the scholarship.
metadata.modelAnswer: He wishes he had applied for the scholarship.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The lecture was too technical for most students to understand.

accepted: It was such a technical lecture that most students could not understand it.
answer.display: It was such a technical lecture that most students could not understand it.

metadata.originalSentence: The lecture was too technical for most students to understand.
metadata.modelAnswer: It was such a technical lecture that most students could not understand it.

problems.title: Sentence Transformation Set 02
problems.statement: Viết lại câu sao cho nghĩa không đổi.
problems.instructions: Nếu có từ khóa, không thay đổi dạng của từ khóa. Hệ thống chỉ chấm đúng tuyệt đối; câu khác đáp án mẫu sẽ cần giáo viên kiểm tra.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: I would prefer you not to mention this to anyone.

accepted: I would rather you did not mention this to anyone.
answer.display: I would rather you did not mention this to anyone.

metadata.originalSentence: I would prefer you not to mention this to anyone.
metadata.modelAnswer: I would rather you did not mention this to anyone.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The manager did not explain the delay until the meeting ended.

accepted: Only after the meeting ended did the manager explain the delay.
answer.display: Only after the meeting ended did the manager explain the delay.

metadata.originalSentence: The manager did not explain the delay until the meeting ended.
metadata.modelAnswer: Only after the meeting ended did the manager explain the delay.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: His failure to revise thoroughly led to his poor result.

accepted: He got a poor result because he had not revised thoroughly.
answer.display: He got a poor result because he had not revised thoroughly.

metadata.originalSentence: His failure to revise thoroughly led to his poor result.
metadata.modelAnswer: He got a poor result because he had not revised thoroughly.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The film was not nearly as impressive as the reviews suggested.

accepted: The film was nowhere near as impressive as the reviews suggested.
answer.display: The film was nowhere near as impressive as the reviews suggested.

metadata.originalSentence: The film was not nearly as impressive as the reviews suggested.
metadata.modelAnswer: The film was nowhere near as impressive as the reviews suggested.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: No one expected the quiet student to win the debate.

accepted: The quiet student turned out to be the winner of the debate.
answer.display: The quiet student turned out to be the winner of the debate.

metadata.originalSentence: No one expected the quiet student to win the debate.
metadata.modelAnswer: The quiet student turned out to be the winner of the debate.

problems.title: Sentence Transformation Set 03
problems.statement: Viết lại câu sao cho nghĩa không đổi.
problems.instructions: Nếu có từ khóa, không thay đổi dạng của từ khóa. Hệ thống chỉ chấm đúng tuyệt đối; câu khác đáp án mẫu sẽ cần giáo viên kiểm tra.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: If the weather had not changed suddenly, we would have reached the summit.

accepted: But for the sudden change in the weather, we would have reached the summit.
answer.display: But for the sudden change in the weather, we would have reached the summit.

metadata.originalSentence: If the weather had not changed suddenly, we would have reached the summit.
metadata.modelAnswer: But for the sudden change in the weather, we would have reached the summit.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The teacher said that the essay needed a clearer argument.

accepted: The teacher said that the essay called for a clearer argument.
answer.display: The teacher said that the essay called for a clearer argument.

metadata.originalSentence: The teacher said that the essay needed a clearer argument.
metadata.modelAnswer: The teacher said that the essay called for a clearer argument.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: She did not lose her temper despite the unfair criticism.

accepted: She kept her temper despite the unfair criticism.
answer.display: She kept her temper despite the unfair criticism.

metadata.originalSentence: She did not lose her temper despite the unfair criticism.
metadata.modelAnswer: She kept her temper despite the unfair criticism.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: He spoke so quietly that nobody at the back could hear him.

accepted: He could not make himself heard at the back because he spoke so quietly.
answer.display: He could not make himself heard at the back because he spoke so quietly.

metadata.originalSentence: He spoke so quietly that nobody at the back could hear him.
metadata.modelAnswer: He could not make himself heard at the back because he spoke so quietly.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: They believe the painting was stolen during the night.

accepted: The painting is thought to have been stolen during the night.
answer.display: The painting is thought to have been stolen during the night.

metadata.originalSentence: They believe the painting was stolen during the night.
metadata.modelAnswer: The painting is thought to have been stolen during the night.

problems.title: Sentence Transformation Set 04
problems.statement: Viết lại câu sao cho nghĩa không đổi.
problems.instructions: Nếu có từ khóa, không thay đổi dạng của từ khóa. Hệ thống chỉ chấm đúng tuyệt đối; câu khác đáp án mẫu sẽ cần giáo viên kiểm tra.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The company had never faced such a serious crisis before.

accepted: Never before had the company faced such a serious crisis.
answer.display: Never before had the company faced such a serious crisis.

metadata.originalSentence: The company had never faced such a serious crisis before.
metadata.modelAnswer: Never before had the company faced such a serious crisis.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: It was careless of him to leave the documents on the train.

accepted: He should not have left the documents on the train.
answer.display: He should not have left the documents on the train.

metadata.originalSentence: It was careless of him to leave the documents on the train.
metadata.modelAnswer: He should not have left the documents on the train.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The new rule made many students confused.

accepted: The new rule gave rise to confusion among many students.
answer.display: The new rule gave rise to confusion among many students.

metadata.originalSentence: The new rule made many students confused.
metadata.modelAnswer: The new rule gave rise to confusion among many students.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: She immediately accepted the offer when it was made.

accepted: No sooner was the offer made than she accepted it.
answer.display: No sooner was the offer made than she accepted it.

metadata.originalSentence: She immediately accepted the offer when it was made.
metadata.modelAnswer: No sooner was the offer made than she accepted it.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: His explanation did not convince me at all.

accepted: I found his explanation completely unconvincing.
answer.display: I found his explanation completely unconvincing.

metadata.originalSentence: His explanation did not convince me at all.
metadata.modelAnswer: I found his explanation completely unconvincing.

problems.title: Sentence Transformation Set 05
problems.statement: Viết lại câu sao cho nghĩa không đổi.
problems.instructions: Nếu có từ khóa, không thay đổi dạng của từ khóa. Hệ thống chỉ chấm đúng tuyệt đối; câu khác đáp án mẫu sẽ cần giáo viên kiểm tra.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: They did not start repairing the bridge until funding was secured.

accepted: Not until funding was secured did they start repairing the bridge.
answer.display: Not until funding was secured did they start repairing the bridge.

metadata.originalSentence: They did not start repairing the bridge until funding was secured.
metadata.modelAnswer: Not until funding was secured did they start repairing the bridge.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The principal’s speech encouraged us to work harder.

accepted: The principal’s speech spurred us on to work harder.
answer.display: The principal’s speech spurred us on to work harder.

metadata.originalSentence: The principal’s speech encouraged us to work harder.
metadata.modelAnswer: The principal’s speech spurred us on to work harder.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: It is possible that she misunderstood the instructions.

accepted: She may have misunderstood the instructions.
answer.display: She may have misunderstood the instructions.

metadata.originalSentence: It is possible that she misunderstood the instructions.
metadata.modelAnswer: She may have misunderstood the instructions.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The team failed because they underestimated their opponents.

accepted: The team’s failure can be accounted for by their underestimating their opponents.
answer.display: The team’s failure can be accounted for by their underestimating their opponents.

metadata.originalSentence: The team failed because they underestimated their opponents.
metadata.modelAnswer: The team’s failure can be accounted for by their underestimating their opponents.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The question was so difficult that nobody answered it correctly.

accepted: Such was the difficulty of the question that nobody answered it correctly.
answer.display: Such was the difficulty of the question that nobody answered it correctly.

metadata.originalSentence: The question was so difficult that nobody answered it correctly.
metadata.modelAnswer: Such was the difficulty of the question that nobody answered it correctly.
